_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Audit Universe & Entity sample payload. 12 entities total, 10 scored. Categories: High Risk/Monthly (6 entities), Medium Risk/Quarterly (4). No Low Risk entities. 2 unscored entities. Control weakness derived from inherent × residual risk category per entity. Category labels and audit frequency mappings are client-configured (not hardcoded).

_controlWeaknessRef.Weak controls: Inherent High + Residual High — controls not reducing risk
_controlWeaknessRef.Strong controls: Inherent High + Residual Low — controls working well
_controlWeaknessRef.Low-risk area: Inherent Low + Residual Low — inherently low risk, well managed
_controlWeaknessRef.Control failure / anomaly: Inherent Low + Residual High — unexpected high residual despite low inherent risk

riskDistribution.description: 10 scored entities: 6 High Risk (Monthly), 4 Medium Risk (Quarterly). 2 entities unscored.

priorityEntities.description: Top 3 entities by residual score requiring immediate audit attention.
